name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. Line the bottom with waxed paper or parchment and grease it.
3. In a pot, place date pieces with water and bring to a boil. Stir in baking soda and set aside.
4. Cream butter until smooth. Add sugar and beat until creamy. Continue beating, adding eggs two at a time, mixing until fluffy. Add vanilla.
5. Mix flour and baking powder with the dates alternately. Pour into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes in a 325-degree oven until firm. Cool on a wire rack.
7. Invert the cake onto the rack; remove the paper. Invert again. Cover and chill.
8. Cut into triangles. Cover with sauce. Warm just before serving by microwaving for 1 minute.
9. For sauce, combine last four ingredients in a pot and boil for 3 minutes. Garnish with caramelized pears and dried pear chips.
Yield: 9 portions
